TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dauqpusan Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Dauqpusan a niyaro', 177 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 684 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 655 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 29 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 68%, Amis 2%, Tayal 3%, Truku 3%, Seediq 15%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮao~u~u*po~u~usan itiniaj i *ħo~u~uo~uxi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ɬ~ɮao~u~u*po~u~usan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, səəɬ~ɮi* **%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Dauqpusan Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Dauqpusan a niyaro', 177 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 684 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 655 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 29 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 68%, Amis 2%, Tayal 3%, Truku 3%, Seediq 15%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
